title: Abbots Morton Spaceport Quikscript source schema

context_sets.description: Reusable selector lists for select/derive rules. Reference them inline as {context_set: name}. Context sets may include other context_set references to compose larger lists from smaller ones.

glyph_families.description: Quikscript glyph families keyed by compiled base glyph name such as qsPea or qsDay_qsUtter.

extensionSpec.description: Extension specification with a pixel count and target glyph list.

glyphReference.description: Glyph or family reference. Structured selector mappings are preferred over bare strings for new authoring.

contextSetRef.description: Reference a top-level context_set by name.

anchorYExceptItem.description: A family to drop from a resolved exit_y / entry_y selector set.

family.description: Family name to exclude from the resolved selector.

anchorYSelector.description: Selects every variant whose exit (exit_y) or entry (entry_y) anchor sits at the given Y. Mirrors the FEA @exit_y{N} / @entry_y{N} classes without hand-curating a context_set. Use exactly one of exit_y or entry_y, with an optional except list of {family: <name>} mappings to drop families from the resolved set.

exit_y.description: Match every variant whose cursive_exit anchor sits at this Y.

entry_y.description: Match every variant whose cursive_entry anchor sits at this Y.

except.description: Families to drop from the resolved selector set.

traitList.description: Semantic Quikscript traits. Use traits for real concepts like alt and half; use modifiers for implementation-level suffixes.

modifierList.description: Ordered modifier tokens that define compiled variant identity and compatibility metadata.

variantList.description: Build variants that should compile this form.

familySelector.description: Structured family selector. family names the base family; traits and modifiers refine the compiled target glyph.

selectorItem.description: A single selector/reference item in a select or derive list.

selectorList.description: Ordered list of glyph/family references for select or derive rules.

selectorListOrNull.description: Selector list, or null to clear an inherited nested key from a parent form.

bitmapRow.description: One bitmap row using spaces and # characters. In source YAML, Quikscript rows should stay double-quoted and keep the bare trailing # comments marking y=5 and y=0 where applicable.

bitmap.description: Top-to-bottom bitmap rows for the glyph shape.

coordinatePair.description: Anchor coordinate pair as [x, y] in glyph pixel space.

items.description: Vertical coordinate in pixels above the baseline.

anchorValue.description: Either a single [x, y] anchor or a list of [x, y] anchors.

anchorValueOrNull.description: Anchor value, or null for an explicit opt-out at this position. On a child form, null clears an anchor inherited from a parent. On a ligature's prop.anchors.entry, null sets entry_explicitly_none on the JoinGlyph: it skips entry inheritance from the lead component and triggers calt_post_liga_left_cleanup, which reverts predecessors out of any lead-component-targeted form.

anchors.description: Cursive attachment anchors. entry and exit compile into curs; entry_curs_only participates only in curs grouping, not normal entry matching.

exit_ink_y.description: Fallback Y row used by the join-gap analysis when the exit anchor's own Y has no ink in the bitmap. Set this when the stroke's exit ink ends one or more rows above or below the exit anchor (e.g. a half form whose exit anchor sits at y=5 while the stroke's last inked row is y=6, or a form whose exit anchor sits at the baseline while the stroke dips to y=-1). The analyzer falls back to this Y to locate the rightmost inked column for computing inter-glyph gaps.

selectRules.description: Context selection rules. These compile into calt conditions such as after, before, not_after, and not_before.

deriveRules.description: Derived-variant relationships and generated extension rules.

adjustmentMap.description: Per-base adjustment overrides keyed by glyph name.

familyRecord.description: A mono/prop/form record. Forms may use inherits to reuse scaffolding from mono, prop, or sibling forms. Set nested select/derive/anchors entries to null when a child form needs to clear an inherited value.

inherits.description: Parent record name or names to merge before applying this record.

shape.description: Shape source to merge in first. Usually the name of a reusable shape, or mono/prop to reuse the base record bitmap.

y_offset.description: Vertical offset in pixels. Deep letters typically use -3.

advance_width.description: Explicit glyph advance width in pixels.

contextual.description: Override the build's default contextual/non-contextual classification for this record.

kerning.description: Kerning group tags attached to this glyph.

top_mark_y.description: Top combining-mark anchor height in pixels.

bottom_mark_y.description: Bottom combining-mark anchor height in pixels.

is_mark.description: Marks the glyph as a combining mark.

base.description: Base glyph name for composite glyph assembly.

top.description: Top combining-mark glyph name for composite glyph assembly.

bottom.description: Bottom combining-mark glyph name for composite glyph assembly.

gate_feature_behind.description: OpenType feature tag (e.g. ss02) that must be enabled for this form to activate.

revert_feature.description: OpenType feature tag (e.g. ss01) that reverts this form to its base glyph when enabled.

replaces_family_feature.description: OpenType feature tag (e.g. ss06) that replaces all family variants with this form when enabled.

shapeRecord.description: Reusable bitmap-only shape data shared by one or more forms.

y_offset.description: Vertical offset in pixels. Deep letters typically use -3.

advance_width.description: Explicit glyph advance width in pixels.

glyphFamily.description: A Quikscript glyph family with mono and/or proportional base records, reusable shapes, and local form labels.

sequence.description: Ligature source sequence. When present, this family compiles to a ligature glyph built from the listed component families.

mono.description: Monospace/base source record for this family.

prop.description: Proportional/base source record for this family.

shapes.description: Reusable shape snippets shared by forms in this family.

derive.description: Family-level derive block shared by every form in this family. Per-form derive blocks still merge on top.

forms.description: Additional forms keyed by local labels. These keys are local authoring labels, not the compiled glyph naming API.
